name: Fix Batch Padding
description: Enable padding so that a list of strings can be processed into a single torch tensor. Return the total number of elements (int) in the 'input_ids' tensor using .numel(). Function must be named 'solution'.
broken_code:
from transformers import AutoTokenizer
import torch

def solution(texts: list) -> int:
    tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained('distilbert-base-uncased')
    # MISSING: padding=True and return_tensors='pt'
    inputs = tokenizer(texts)
    # This will fail until return_tensors='pt' is added
    return int(inputs['input_ids'].numel())
